productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Canvas Olive Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish, green and brown bag from lino perros to your accessory collection. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 34 cm Width: 44 cm Depth: 14 cm Made of synthetic leather and canvas for durability Has one main roomy, zipped compartment with one inner zipped compartment and an organiser pouch for essentials One broad, short synthetic leather handle woven through metallic loops and a long, removable and adjustable canvas strap for carrying ease and style A zipped pocket at the back synthetic leather patch design on the sides an bottom for style Stitch detailing, branded zips and brand badge appliqué d on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
